zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ruggles Jr於1633年10月6日出生在英國艾可納時，他的父親John Ruggles Sr42歲，母親Barbara Bridge40歲。他於1655年4月3日與Mary Gibson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1713年2月25日在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年79歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利艾略特 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Ruggles Jr于1633年10月6日出生在英国艾可納时，他的父亲John Ruggles Sr42岁，母亲Barbara Bridge40岁。他于1655年4月3日与Mary Gibson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1713年2月25日在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年79岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利艾略特 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ruggles Jr was born on 6 October 1633, in Nazeing, Essex, England, his father, John Ruggles Sr, was 42 and his mother, Barbara Bridge, was 40. He married Mary Gibson on 3 April 1655, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 25 February 1713, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 79, and was buried in Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Ruggles Jr est né le 6 octobre 1633, à Nazeing, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Ruggles Sr, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Barbara Bridge, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Mary Gibson le 3 avril 1655, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 25 février 1713, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Ruggles Jr am 6. Oktober 1633 in Nazeing, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Ruggles Sr 42 und seine Mutter Barbara Bridge 40. Er hat am 3. April 1655 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Gibson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 25. Februar 1713 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Ruggles Jr è nato il il 6 ottobre 1633 nel Nazeing, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Ruggles Sr, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Barbara Bridge, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Mary Gibson il 3 aprile 1655, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 25 febbraio 1713, nel Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Ruggles Jrが1633年10月6日にイギリスエセックスナズエイングで生まれた時，父John Ruggles Srは42歳，母Barbara Bridgeは40歳であった。1655年4月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーでMary Gibsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1713年2月25日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンロクスブリーで79歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーエリオト ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Ruggles Jr(이)가 1633년 10월 6일 영국 에세스 나즈인그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ruggles Sr(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara Bridge(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1655년 4월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 Mary Gibson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1713년 2월 25일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이 엘리엇 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Ruggles Jr nasceu em 6 de outubro de 1633, em Nazeing, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Ruggles Sr, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Bridge, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Gibson em 3 de abril de 1655, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 25 de fevereiro de 1713, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ruggles Jr родился 6 октября 1633 г. в местности назинг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Ruggles Sr было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Barbara Bridge, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Gibson 3 апреля 1655 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 25 февраля 1713 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности элиот буринг гроунд, роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Ruggles Jr nació el 6 de octubre de 1633, en Nazeing, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Ruggles Sr, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Barbara Bridge, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Mary Gibson el 3 de abril de 1655, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 25 de febrero de 1713, en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
